MODULE: cosmos.core.a2a_protocol
FILE: cosmos/core/a2a_protocol.py (940 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos A2A Protocol - Agent-to-Agent Communication.

AGI v1.8 Feature: Direct agent-to-agent collaboration protocol
for peer sessions, task auctions, context sharing, and skill transfer.

Features:
- A2AMessageType: Standard message types for agent communication
- A2AMessage: Message structure with

- SessionState(Enum): State of an A2A session.
- BidStatus(Enum): Status of a task auction bid.
- A2AMessage: Message structure for agent-to-agent communication.
